chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2591 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on office objection. For hearing of M.A No.9724/17. For orders on M.A No.12129/17. For hearing of main case. 16-04-2019. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General. = None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Same was the position on last date of hearing, which shows that perhaps the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest to pursue this petition, which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
